UNIVERSITY POLICIES

University of Maryland, College Park and University System of Maryland policies and procedures that may impinge on an undergraduate student's studies can be found on the following sites:

• Consolidated USM and UMD Policies and Procedures: https:// policies.umd.edu/

• University System of Maryland Academic Affairs: https:// www.usmd.edu/regents/bylaws/SectionIII/

• Statewide Educational Policies: https://dsd.maryland.gov/Pages/ COMARHome.aspx/
